Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an event log with multiple cases We need to design a POWL model that can represent the process observed in the log First lets analyze the log to understand the activities and their relationships

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Every case starts with OR then MS then QS then AS This sequence is consistent in all cases

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the first AS there is an IQC in cases 1 2 3 5 However in case 4 there is no IQC and no rework So we have a choice either proceed with IQC or skip it

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In cases 1 2 3 5 after IQC we see AS again rework and then sometimes IQC again case 3 and 5 have multiple IQC AS loops This suggests a loop for rework after IQC

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Specifically if IQC fails we go back to AS and then IQC again But note that in case 4 we skip the entire IQC AS loop and go straight to TST

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After TST we see that in cases 1 3 5 there is an RT followed by TST again This is a loop for re testing In case 2 there is no RT so it goes straight to PK after TST In case 4 also no RT So we have a choice after TST either proceed to PK or go to RT and then TST again and then possibly repeat

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After PK we have LB in cases 1 3 4 5 but in case 2 LB is skipped So we have a choice either do LB or skip it with a silent transition

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then every case has DP and then D

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the process can be broken down into the following segments Segment 1 The initial sequence OR to MS to QS to AS

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: After the first AS we have a choice either skip the rework and go to TST or enter a rework loop that consists of IQC and then a choice if we pass we exit the loop and go to TST but if we fail we do AS and then IQC again

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can model the rework loop as Let ReworkLoop equals loop of IQC and AS This means execute IQC then either exit the loop or execute AS and then IQC again and so on

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Therefore we have a choice after the first AS either do ReworkLoop or skip to TST

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: AfterTST equals choice of TestingLoop and tau

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait careful the loop of TST and RT means do TST then either exit or do RT and then TST again and so on But note that we already did TST before the loop

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Given the log we see that after TST if we do RT then we do TST again So the sequence is TST to RT to TST until we exit

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we can model the testing phase as TST then loop of RT and TST

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: After PK equals choice of LB and tau Then after AfterPK we do DP and then D

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Putting it all together Step1 equals OR to MS to QS to AS ReworkLoop equals loop of IQC and AS AfterStep1 equals choice of ReworkLoop and tau TestingLoop equals loop of RT and TST TestingPhase equals TST then choice of TestingLoop and tau AfterPK equals choice of LB and tau Then DP and D in sequence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The top level partial order nodes are Step1 AfterStep1 TestingPhase PK AfterPK DP D with order Step1 to AfterStep1 AfterStep1 to TestingPhase TestingPhase to PK PK to AfterPK AfterPK to DP DP to D

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets verify with the cases Case 1 Step1 then AfterStep1 chooses ReworkLoop then TestingPhase chooses TestingLoop then PK then AfterPK chooses LB then DP then D

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Step1 then AfterStep1 chooses ReworkLoop then TestingPhase chooses tau skip re testing then PK then AfterPK chooses tau skip LB then DP then D

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Step1 then AfterStep1 chooses ReworkLoop with multiple repetitions then TestingPhase chooses TestingLoop then PK then AfterPK chooses LB then DP then D

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 4 Step1 then AfterStep1 chooses tau skip rework then TestingPhase chooses tau skip re testing then PK then AfterPK chooses LB then DP then D

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 5 Step1 then AfterStep1 chooses ReworkLoop with multiple repetitions then TestingPhase chooses TestingLoop with multiple repetitions then PK then AfterPK chooses LB then DP then D
